title: Nearby-position rival strategy pressure
summary: Summarize tyre and stop-pressure states of nearby rivals in track position rather than the entire field.
rationale: Run variants around undercut and nearby-position context were less consistently strong but technically distinct. Pit decisions can be driven by covering or undercutting cars close in race order rather than by field-wide averages.
implementation_hint: Within each Year-Race-LapNumber group, sort by Position and compute leave-one-out rolling summaries for rivals within a small position window, including current-tyre finish pressure, next-stop feasibility, PitStop, and LapTime_Delta. Compare the current row to these local-rival summaries.
expected_effect: Small AUC gain with low-medium confidence.
risk: Position-window features are more complex and may overfit or fail on small same-lap groups. Keep only a few aggregates and test after the simpler same-lap peer block.
